subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — we appreciate Partner Corp's interest in exploring a collaboration, and we'd be happy to arrange an introductory call.

Here are a few slots that work on our end:

• April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Please let us know which works best for you, and we'll send a calendar invite.

Regarding your request for our internal contact directory and direct phone lines — I'm afraid we're unable to share internal contact information externally. However, rest assured that the appropriate stakeholders will be looped in as our discussions progress.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
